WildBountyShowdownRules.Rule1: Wild Bounty Showdown is a 6-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 6, 4 rows in reels 2 and 5, 5 rows in reels 3 and 4) video slot featuring Gold Framed Symbols and increasing multiplier.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{3600} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: The game is played with 20 base bet for 3600 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of <configured value: minimum bet size> to <configured value: maximum bet size>.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 3600 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

WildBountyShowdownRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
WildBountyShowdownRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
WildBountyShowdownRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

WildBountyShowdownFeatures.GoldFramedSymbolsExplain1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 3 and/or 4 may appear as gold framed symbols.
WildBountyShowdownFeatures.GoldFramedSymbolsExplain2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol(s).
WildBountyShowdownFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
WildBountyShowdownFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: At the start of every free spin, the win multiplier is x8.
WildBountyShowdownFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be doubled.
WildBountyShowdownFeatures.MaximumWinExplain1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
WildBountyShowdownFeatures.MaximumWinExplain2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

WildBountyShowdownMultiplier.MultiplierExplain1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
WildBountyShowdownMultiplier.MultiplierExplain2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be doubled.
WildBountyShowdownMultiplier.MultiplierExplain3: The maximum win multiplier is x%{1024}.

WildBountyShowdownCommonRule.WildExplanation1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
WildBountyShowdownCommonRule.WildExplanation2: Gold Framed symbols appears on reels 3 and 4 only.
